summary: M.S. in Artificial Intelligence from Illinois Institute of Technology with 2+ years of Python experience building and deploying ML systems at scale. Developed production ML infrastructure spanning data processing pipelines, model training, evaluation frameworks, and containerized deployment on Kubernetes across computer vision, NLP, and LLM applications. Experienced implementing model optimization workflows, debugging production inference systems, and contributing to scalable ML infrastructure on AWS and GCP. Strong foundation in data structures, algorithms, and distributed systems with a track record of shipping reliable, well-tested code in fast-moving environments.

skills.languages: Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, SQL, Go, C++ (familiar), Java (familiar)
skills.ml: PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, HuggingFace Transformers, Large Language Models (LLMs), NLP, Computer Vision, Object Detection, Model Optimization, Model Evaluation, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), LangChain, Prompt Engineering, Vector Embeddings, SHAP
skills.infra: ML Infrastructure, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD (GitHub Actions), AWS, GCP, FastAPI, RESTful APIs, Distributed Systems, PostgreSQL, Supabase, Pinecone, Railway, Vercel, Git
